text: In real apps, users just don't stay on just one screen as you guys all know.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 3/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm.vtt

text: They move between screens.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 3/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm.vtt

text: In this lecture, we will learn how to navigate between screens imperatively using React Navigation's

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 3/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm.vtt

text: Navigation Object.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 3/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm.vtt

text: You will see how to go forward, go back, replace any screen and control the navigation stack.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 3/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm.vtt

text: Perfect.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 3/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm.vtt

text: So, now let's move ahead and start talking about it.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 3/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm.vtt

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 3/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm.vtt

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 3/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm.vtt

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 3/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm/3. Navigation Between Screens_epm.vtt
